mapper.sql: select asset_id, asset_code, asset_name, category_id, brand, model, specification, serial_no, asset_status, asset_source, use_org_dept_id, manage_dept_id, current_user_id, current_location_id, purchase_date, inbound_date, start_use_date, original_value, residual_value, warranty_expire_date, supplier_name, qr_code, version_no, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from asset_info
mapper.insert: insert into asset_info ( asset_code, asset_name, category_id, brand, model, specification, serial_no, asset_status, asset_source, use_org_dept_id, manage_dept_id, current_user_id, current_location_id, purchase_date, inbound_date, start_use_date, original_value, residual_value, warranty_expire_date, supplier_name, qr_code, version_no, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{categoryId}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{specification}, #{serialNo}, #{assetStatus}, #{assetSource}, #{useOrgDeptId}, #{manageDeptId}, #{currentUserId}, #{currentLocationId}, #{purchaseDate}, #{inboundDate}, #{startUseDate}, #{originalValue}, #{residualValue}, #{warrantyExpireDate}, #{supplierName}, #{qrCode}, #{versionNo}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update:
update asset_info set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where asset_id in
#{assetId}
